back_translation: Therefore, since you have been raised up together with Lord Christ, seek the things that are above — that is, where Lord Christ is seated at the right hand of God
Set your minds on the things above; do not set your minds on the things on the earth
Because you have already died, and your life is hidden with Lord Christ in God
When Lord Christ, who is your life, appears, then you also will appear together with Him in glory
Therefore, put to death the parts of yourselves that are tied to this world — that is, sexual immorality, impurity, lust, evil desires, and greed, which is idolatry
Because of these things, the wrath of God is coming upon the sons of disobedience
In those ways, you yourselves also formerly walked in life when you were still living in these things
But now, you also must throw off all these things — that is, anger, rage, malice, slander, and shameful speech from your mouths
Do not lie to one another, because you have already taken off the old man together with his actions
And have put on the new man, who is being made anew toward true knowledge, in the image of the One who created the new man
In that new life, there is no Greek or Jew, circumcised or uncircumcised, foreigner, Scythian, slave or freeman; but Lord Christ is all things and is in all
Therefore, as those whom God has chosen, holy and beloved, put on hearts that are full of compassion, kindness, humility, gentleness, and patience
Bear with one another and forgive one another; if anyone has a grievance against someone, just as Lord Jesus has forgiven you, so also you should forgive one another
And above all these things, put on love, which is the bond of completeness
And let the peace of Lord Christ rule in your hearts; for you have been called to enter into this peace as one body; and be people whose hearts give thanks
Let the word of Lord Christ dwell in you abundantly, in all wisdom; teach and admonish one another with psalms, hymns of praise, and spiritual songs, with grace, singing in your hearts to God
And whatever you do, both in word and in deed, do all things in the name of Lord Jesus, by giving thanks to God the Father through Him
Wives, submit yourselves to your own husbands, because it is fitting in Lord Jesus
Husbands, love your own wives, and do not show anger toward them
Children, obey your fathers and mothers in everything, because this is pleasing in Lord Jesus
Fathers, do not provoke your children, so that they will not become discouraged
Slaves, obey your earthly-flesh masters in everything; not only in front of their eyes, like those who seek to please humans, but with sincerity of heart, fearing Lord Jesus
Whatever you do, work at it with all your soul, as those working for Lord Jesus, not as those working for humans
You know that you will receive an inheritance as a reward in return from Lord Jesus; you are serving Lord Jesus, that is, Lord Christ
Whoever does wrong will receive a return for what wrong he has done; and God does not show favoritism to anyone
